title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
summary: Moonshot AI launched Kimi K2.7 Code, a coding-focused agentic model with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture and one trillion parameters. The model supports a 256K context window and includes a CLI tool for repository exploration, file editing, and command execution.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, a coding-focused agentic model built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters and a 256K context window. It matters because the model ships with a CLI tool that handles repository exploration, file editing, and command execution, extending it beyond plain code generation into agentic workflows. The key takeaways are the model's scale, its long context, and the bundled tooling for working directly inside codebases.
